title: Buttondown vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Buttondown vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Buttondown and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Buttondown is built for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Developers And Technical Writers Who Prefer Markdown
comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on developers and technical writers who prefer markdown
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Buttondown wins for developers and technical writers who prefer markdown, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Buttondown or Ghost?
faq.a: Buttondown starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Buttondown?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
